title: Windows Scheduled Task Creation via Schtasks
description: Detects creation of scheduled tasks via schtasks.exe with suspicious patterns. Scheduled tasks are a common persistence and execution mechanism.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*schtasks.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/create*' or 'Command Line' like '*-create*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate task scheduling by system administrators
